use_codes.desc: METHOD OF ANESTHETIZING AT LEAST A PORTION OF THE MAXILLARY DENTAL ARCH

indications.text:
KOVANAZETM is indicated for regional anesthesia when performing a restorative procedure on Teeth 4-13 and
A-J in adults and children who weigh 40 kg or more.
